title: Review of the definition of higher-risk buildings
body: "The Grenfell Tower Inquiry Phase 2 report recommended an urgent review of the definition of higher-risk buildings.  The Ministry for Housing, Communities and Local Government asked the Building Safety Regulator to undertake an initial review.  The documents on this page set out:   the results of the Building Safety Regulator’s initial review of the definition of higher-risk buildings and plans for the ongoing review. the government’s position on the outcome of the review and whether the categories of buildings covered by the higher-risk regimes will be amended in any way at the present time  "
